title: narcissus assoanus var. palearensis
intro: Narcissus assoanus var. palearensis is a rare and lesser-known species of the narcissus plant, belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Narcissus assoanus var. palearensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and its medicinal properties are utilized in various herbal preparations, including salves, poultices, and teas.
